businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge cible pour prendre la retraite.

inputs.label: Annual Retirement Expenses (Today's Dollars)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual expenses during retirement, in today's dollars (fat FIRE typically high spending).

label_i18n.fr: Dépenses annuelles de retraite (en dollars d'aujourd'hui)
label_i18n.es: Gastos anuales de jubilación (dólares de hoy)

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual expenses during retirement, in today's dollars (fat FIRE typically high spending).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emeklilik sırasında beklenen yıllık giderler, bugünün parasıyla (Fat FIRE genellikle yüksek harcama anlamına gelir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Ausgaben im Ruhestand in heutigen Dollar (Fat FIRE typischerweise hohe Ausgaben).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses annuelles attendues pendant la retraite, en dollars d'aujourd'hui (Fat FIRE implique généralement des dépenses élevées).
businessContext_i18n.es: Gastos anuales esperados durante la jubilación, en dólares actuales (fat FIRE generalmente implica gastos altos).

inputs.label: Current Savings
inputs.businessContext: Current amount already saved for retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current amount already saved for retirement.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bereits für den Ruhestand gesparter Betrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant actuel déjà épargné pour la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad actual ya ahorrada para la jubilación.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: Amount you plan to save each month until retirement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount you plan to save each month until retirement.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emekliliğe kadar her ay biriktirmeyi planladığınız miktar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betrag, den Sie monatlich bis zum Ruhestand sparen möchten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant que vous prévoyez d'épargner chaque mois jusqu'à la retraite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad que planea ahorrar cada mes hasta la jubilación.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Real Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual real return on investments (e.g., 0.07 for 7%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual real return on investments (e.g., 0.07 for 7%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yatırımlardan beklenen yıllık reel getiri (örneğin, %7 için 0.07).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Realrendite der Anlagen (z. B. 0,07 für 7 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement réel annuel attendu des investissements (par exemple, 0,07 pour 7 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Rendimiento real anual esperado de las inversiones (ej. 0.07 para 7%).

businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'inflation annuel attendu (par exemple, 0,03 pour 3 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de inflación anual esperada (ej. 0.03 para 3%).

inputs.label: Safe Withdrawal Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of portfolio you can safely withdraw annually (e.g., 0.04 for 4% rule).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of portfolio you can safely withdraw annually (e.g., 0.04 for 4% rule).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Portföyden yıllık olarak güvenle çekilebilecek yüzde (örneğin, %4 kuralı için 0.04).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Portfolios, der jährlich sicher entnommen werden kann (z. B. 0,04 für 4 %-Regel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du portefeuille que vous pouvez retirer en toute sécurité chaque année (par exemple, 0,04 pour la règle des 4 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la cartera que puede retirar anualmente de forma segura (ej. 0.04 para la regla del 4%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
